name: Llama-3.1-ELYZA-JP-70B
license: Proprietary — enterprise/partner access only (no public license terms published; not an open-weight release)
archDisplay: 70B dense transformer (Llama-3.1 architecture, Japanese continual pretrain + instruction tuning)
note: Latest ELYZA LLM for JP flagship, built on Llama 3.1 for longer context and improved Japanese instruction-following vs. the earlier Llama-3-based 70B; distributed only via demo and enterprise API/joint-development deals, not as public open weights.
verificationNotes: Real, confirmed release: ELYZA's own news post and PR Times release (both 2024-10-25), plus corroborating JP tech press (Nikkei xTECH, Mynavi, CodeZine), confirm a 70B (700-oku-parameter) Llama-3.1-based Japanese model with improved long-context/instruction-following over the prior Llama-3 70B. CORRECTED openness from 'open-weights' to 'closed': ELYZA's press release explicitly states the model is 'provided to companies in various forms through secure API services and joint development projects' (enterprise-only), not released as public weights — only a hosted demo is public. Fetching https://huggingface.co/elyza/Llama-3.1-ELYZA-JP-70B returns HTTP 401 'Invalid username or password' (gated/private repo), unlike ELYZA's genuinely open 8B sibling models on HF. License field corrected accordingly since no public license text exists for this restricted-access model. ctxK=128 and langCount=2 are reasonable carry-overs from the Llama-3.1 base architecture but are not explicitly confirmed by ELYZA for this JP variant specifically.
